titleStmt.title: SII 38.414: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 414. (A.R. No. 414 of 1912.) MARUDĀḌU, WANDIWASH TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north base, central shrine, Purandarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records a gift of a village Vāḍikuppam, a hamlet in Marudāḍu as tirunāmattukkāṇi for conducting offerings and worship to the god (uḍaiyavar) of the big temple (perun-tirukkōyil) at Marudāḍu in Vāttippaṟṟu, for the merit of Timmarāśasvāmi Eṟṟamārāsa, an agent of Dēvachōḻa mahārāsa. (mistake for Dēvarāja Mahārāja ?)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṉmahaāmaṇṭaliśvara cekattāppi Eṟayaiteva coḻamahā Irācāvin kāriyattukku kaṭaiva timmarācā cuvāmi Eṟṟa marācāvin tanmam Āka vāttippaṟṟu marutāṭuuṭaiyavar perunti
ruk koyiluṭaiya tampirāṉāṟku mahāpūcai tiruppaṇakkuRead tiruppaṇikkumarutāṭṭu piṭākai vāṭikkuppam tarunāmattukkāṇiDo tirunāmattukkāṇiĀka viṭṭom yinta taṉmattukku yātoruttar Akutampaṇṇiṉavaṉuṇṭā
vil keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭaivarkaḷ marutāṭṭile yātoruttar Akutampaṇṇiṉa Avaṉ Apimāṉam cātiyīṉaṉukku kuṭuttavaṉ Inta Iṟaiyili caṟuvamāṉiyattukku Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile kaāraāmpacuvai koṉIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.414 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
